ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "origin" INTEGER /* Origin of the vehicle (1: USA, 2: Europe, 3: Japan) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle type */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Production year of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES vehicle_origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle type data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle type data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle origin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle origin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle origin data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle origin data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has this permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_dictionaries" (
  "data_dictionary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data dictionary */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that this data dictionary belongs to */,
  "data_definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_dictionary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_dictionaries_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
